Set up CI/CD pipeline with automated quality checks (Lighthouse, accessibility), build triggers, deployment automation, and pre-commit hooks (lint + unit tests)

Define branching strategy; enforce mandatory PR review on main; author merges own PR after approval; aem.js unchanged; establish code review standards

UI layout matches approved design mockups / Figma at all viewports; spacing, padding, alignment, and typography match design specifications within acceptable tolerance

Test all custom blocks, interactive features, forms, end-to-end user journeys, error scenarios, and third-party API integrations

Secure all API endpoints: authentication, input sanitization, rate limiting, CORS policies, and API versioning strategy
Implement RBAC; verify content folder and GitHub access controls; conduct regular access reviews and audits
Implement data encryption at rest and in transit; implement GDPR compliance; configure privacy settings and cookie consent; document data handling policies

Ensure blocks are intuitive for authors; validate block configuration options are clear; create block usage documentation for authors
Verify document-to-web rendering (formatting, tables, images); test fragment embedding and update propagation; test one-click publish, cache purge, preview fidelity, and bulk metadata updates
Leverage CDN caching with instant purge; configure appropriate cache headers; test cache invalidation strategies; implement effective browser caching
Monitor RUM data for performance insights; set up performance degradation alerts; track performance trends over time

Test with screen readers (NVDA, JAWS, VoiceOver); verify WCAG 2.1 Level AA compliance; validate color and sensory characteristics are not the sole means of conveying information
Test keyboard-only navigation (Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter / Space, Arrow keys); ensure all interactive elements are keyboard accessible with visible focus indicators

Create deployment runbook; define schedule and maintenance window; assign roles and responsibilities; prepare and test rollback plan; define rollback decision criteria
Validate preview and live domain configuration; verify custom domain mapping; test preview-to-live promotion workflow
Complete E2E testing, smoke testing, and load testing in production-like environment; validate all integrations in production

Configure centralized logging; set up error rate, uptime, performance threshold, and security event alerts
Monitor Core Web Vitals, RUM metrics, CDN performance and cache hit rates, traffic patterns, and peak loads

Establish incident response procedures; define SLA for issue resolution; create support documentation and runbooks; set up support ticketing system
Monitor search engine indexing status; track business KPIs and organic traffic; review site analytics and user behavior
